title: Feng Shui Coin
description:
Long before computers and digital systems arrived in Bandung, the founder of Sukajadi Hotel relied on a few trusted tools to keep the hotel running smoothly. The old clock marked each working hour, the abacus helped him calculate room rates and expenses, and the accordion brought music to the lobby as he entertained guests in the evenings.

These items were more than objects — they were part of his daily routine, symbols of how business was done with care, precision, and a personal touch. Today, they remain preserved as a reminder of the hotel’s beginnings and the warm, hands‑on hospitality that shaped Sukajadi from its earliest days.

title: Indonesian Tradition & the Spirit of Working Together
description:
These handcrafted wooden figurines reflect a timeless Indonesian value: gotong royong — the ethic of working together in harmony. Each figure represents a member of the community, contributing their part with dedication and pride. Painted in warm traditional colours and carved with care, they symbolize how Indonesians have long relied on cooperation, unity, and shared responsibility to build, create, and support one another.

Displayed today, they serve as a reminder of the cultural roots that shaped the hotel’s early days — a spirit of teamwork, mutual help, and collective effort that continues to inspire the way Sukajadi welcomes and serves its guests.

title: Art Collection for Sale
description: Exquisite collections of traditional oil paintings and antique collectibles available for purchase, offering guests an opportunity to take home a piece of Bandung's rich cultural heritage.

title: Journey in Silence
description: These paired paintings capture the quiet elegance of figures in traditional conical hats, rendered with expressive brushstrokes that suggest movement and contemplation. The left canvas, in vivid red tones, conveys vitality and determination, while the right, in soft white hues, evokes serenity and balance. Together, they symbolize the harmony between energy and calm, tradition and modernity.

title: Harmony in Stillness
description: This artwork presents a serene Buddha head framed by two intricately carved open hands, symbolizing calmness, protection, and mindful presence. Displayed on minimalist pedestals, the trio adds a warm, contemplative accent to Hotel Sukajadi Bandung, complementing the hotel’s colonial charm with a touch of cultural elegance.
